name: PR Scan - Authenticated scan of real public GitHub PR
description: After mock login, navigate to /pr-scan, paste a real public GitHub PR URL, submit the scan, and verify a Trust Score is returned with findings breakdown.

planSteps.description: The page shows the PR Scan interface with an input field for a GitHub PR URL — not a login wall
In the PR URL input field, type the URL: https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/73509
Click the Scan or Analyze button to submit the PR for scanning
A Trust Score between 0 and 100 is displayed in the results panel
The results show a breakdown with at least one of: findings count, high/medium/low severity labels, or a message confirming the PR was analyzed
